title: HAL control — drive mocked inputs, observe the round-trip
description: Injects a digital and an analog HAL input, waits for the IoBlock to observe them, and asserts the values reached its service properties. Exercises the digitalInput / analogInput / waitUntil scenario step types (the ones the other scenarios don't) and the full HAL round-trip: mocked input -> block -> observable property.

steps.label: wait until the block observes the digital input
the digital input reached the block
the analog input reached the block
